message:
test(gateway): add service tests for testing suite

Add 101 new tests covering previously untested services:
- tokenizer.service (20 tests): token counting, truncation, chunking
- context-budget.service (34 tests): budget allocation, validation
- audit (17 tests): audit event creation and helpers
- agent-events (15 tests): WebSocket event publishing
- mail-events (15 tests): reservation and conflict events

Part of flywheel_gateway-tz4 (Comprehensive Testing Suite).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
